title: Require generated mirrors to justify checked-in paths
goal: Implement #539 by making generated/reconstructable mirrors declare why they stay checked in, how they are regenerated, and where ordinary agents should route instead.
Preserve weak-agent compatibility while preventing generated mirrors from becoming independent doctrine.
non_goals: Do not delete weak-agent adapter files before proving their consumers are gone.
Do not implement duplicate planning checker collapse from #540 in this slice.
Do not create a new top-level command or repo-specific GitHub dependency.

intent.outcome: checked-in generated mirrors have explicit source command, named consumer, freshness check, and removal/demotion path
intent.constraints: repo/tool/language agnostic; prefer existing inventory/checks; keep ordinary agents routed to compact canonical commands
intent.latitude: may update structured inventory schema/data/checks/tests and planning state
intent.escalation: stop if satisfying the issue requires deleting compatibility adapters or adding a new permanent surface

execution.next_step: archive #539 and continue by ingesting #543 before returning to #540
execution.proof: passed: structured inventory check, focused inventory tests, maintainer surfaces, planning surfaces, planning doctor, workspace CLI tests, ruff, contract tooling

invariants: generated mirrors are compatibility/support surfaces, not canonical authority
freshness stays behind existing render/check commands

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: stop checking in reconstructable artifact residue

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: bounded inspection of generated mirror consumers and checks
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: do not edit; preserve weak-agent compatibility; do not delete mirrors prematurely
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: which existing inventory/check surface should carry generated mirror justification
delegated_judgment.escalate when: implementation requires a new command or removing a stable-path consumer

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: generated mirrors can stay only when a stable consumer, regeneration path, freshness check, and demotion path are explicit
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Proof selection over-selected broad workspace CLI tests for a contract/check-only change; routed to #543.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Generated mirror metadata is declared inside the existing structured inventory, covers JSON and Markdown adapter mirrors, and checks require generated-required-adapter entries to have matching mirror metadata.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for #539; #543 was added as dogfooding friction and #540 remains in the reconstructable-artifact-policy lane.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Resume and dogfood after each slice.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: continue reconstructable-artifact compression while extracting package improvement signals
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify generated mirrors route more than they teach

execution_bounds.allowed paths: structured inventory schema/data/checks/tests plus planning state
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py; make maintainer-surfaces
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: new command or generated adapter deletion

stop_conditions.stop when: generated mirror metadata is encoded, checked, and tested
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: a declared mirror has no defensible stable-path consumer

context_budget.tiny resumability note: continue #539 from generated mirror metadata checks
context_budget.context-shift triggers: before commit or after validation failure

immediate_next_action: Ingest and consider #543 before returning to #540.
invariants: Do not route ordinary agents to generated mirrors before compact canonical queries.
Do not make host-specific tracker assumptions in shipped package policy.
Prefer existing checks and inventory over a new durable surface.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Generated mirrors are acceptable checked-in artifacts only when a stable-path consumer and freshness check are explicit.
open_questions_to_close: Can the existing structured inventory carry generated mirror policy without adding another surface?
completion_criteria: Generated/reconstructable mirrors declare source command, named consumer, checked-in justification, freshness check, ordinary route, and demotion path.
Generated JSON adapter inventory entries are covered by generated mirror metadata.
Markdown generated adapters are covered despite not being structured files.
Checks verify the declared mirrors exist, are small, and have complete metadata.
#539 closes and parent lane routes to #540.

execution_run.what happened: Extended the existing structured-file inventory with generated_mirrors metadata and added checks for source command, named consumer, freshness check, ordinary route, demotion path, size, and generated-required-adapter coverage.
execution_run.scope touched: structured inventory schema/data/checker/tests and planning state
execution_run.changed surfaces: generated mirror policy now lives inside the existing inventory instead of a new surface
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success
execution_run.result for continuation: #539 complete; #543 was created and ingested as a proof-selection dogfooding issue; #540 remains after that.
execution_run.next step: archive plan, close #539, commit, then evaluate #543 priority before #540

finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact summary/proof and reused existing inventory/check surfaces before adding a new surface
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: route dogfooding friction to #543 and keep #540 for duplicate checker payload collapse

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: structured inventory check, focused tests, maintainer surfaces, planning surfaces, planning doctor, workspace CLI tests, ruff, and contract tooling passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Require checked-in generated mirrors to justify why regeneration is not enough.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: generated/reconstructable mirror metadata names source commands, consumers, justifications, freshness checks, ordinary routes, demotion paths, and size limits; checks cover JSON and Markdown mirrors
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #540 for duplicate planning checker payload copies; #543 for proof selector friction discovered while closing this slice

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve only context that is expensive to rediscover and necessary for safe continuation.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: justify retained generated mirrors before deleting them
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Do generated mirrors remain compatibility adapters rather than product doctrine?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #539 justifies generated mirrors, but #540 still needs duplicate planning checker payload collapse; #543 is separate workflow friction.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml routes #543 in workflow-friction-polish and leaves reconstructable-artifact-policy at #540.
closure_check.reopen trigger: new checked-in generated mirrors appear without source command, named consumer, freshness check, ordinary route, and demotion path

durable_residue.learned constraint: generated mirrors need stable consumer, regeneration, freshness, and demotion metadata to justify checked-in state
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: reduce generated adapter residue while preserving weak-agent compatibility
durable_residue.promotion trigger: generated mirror consumers or regeneration paths change
